summary: Tested StartupModal performance fix for SentCom AI trading platform. All critical fixes verified: (1) /api/startup-check responds in ~100-300ms consistently across 10 rapid calls, (2) /api/health responds in <1 second (was 6-47s before fix), (3) /api/ib-collector/fill-gaps returns without hanging (completed in ~25s processing 442 symbols), (4) StartupModal loads within 3 seconds showing all services, (5) Core Systems (Backend, WebSocket, Database) show green/Ready, (6) Get Started button is clickable and dismisses modal correctly.

issues: validateDOMNesting warning: <button> cannot appear as descendant of <button> in JobManager component - minor HTML nesting issue

details: /api/startup-check responds in ~100-300ms (target met)
10 rapid sequential calls all completed in <1 second
Average response time: ~200ms across 10 calls
Returns correct JSON structure with all 9 fields: backend, database, websocket, ib, ollama, timeseries, scanner, learning, timestamp
/api/health responds in <1 second (was 6-47 seconds before fix)
5 consecutive calls all completed quickly
Returns {status: 'healthy', timestamp: ...}
/api/ib-collector/fill-gaps returns without hanging
Completed in ~25 seconds (expected for 442 symbols)
Uses asyncio.to_thread() for DB operations to avoid blocking event loop
Returns proper JSON with success, message, gaps_found, total_unique_symbols fields
StartupModal appears with data-testid='startup-modal'
All 8 services displayed with proper status indicators
Core Systems (Backend, WebSocket, Database) show Ready with green checkmarks
IB Gateway and AI Assistant show Unavailable (expected in preview)
Live Scanner, AI Predictions, Learning Engine show Ready
Progress bar shows 75% (6/8 services ready)
Get Started button enabled and clickable
Modal dismisses correctly when Get Started clicked
Main dashboard loads correctly after StartupModal dismissed
CommandCenter page renders with SentCom, Bot Performance, Live Scanner Alerts
WebSocket connection established successfully
No ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors

critical_code_review_comments: asyncio.to_thread() correctly wraps sync DB operations in fill-gaps endpoint to avoid blocking event loop
/api/startup-check uses only in-memory state checks - no DB queries or network calls
StartupModal uses single consolidated endpoint instead of 6+ individual health checks
Minor: validateDOMNesting warning in JobManager component (button inside button) - cosmetic issue

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed - startup-check, health, fill-gaps all working correctly)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (StartupModal loads, services show correct status, Get Started works, dashboard loads)

context_for_next_testing_agent: StartupModal performance fix verified. Key endpoints: /api/startup-check (single consolidated endpoint, ~200ms), /api/health (<1s), /api/ib-collector/fill-gaps (returns in ~25s, not hanging). IB Gateway and Ollama expected to be unavailable in preview environment. Core systems (Backend, WebSocket, Database) should always show Ready.
